NoResponse.description: Represents an empty successful response where no payload is returned.

Response Code.description: HTTP response code indicating no content is returned.

url.description: Endpoint URL associated with the response.

type.description: Resource type returned by the API.

pin-category.description:
Represents a pin folder (chat folder) object. Fields marked conditional are only present when the matching include_fields value is requested.

Note: The default folder only contains category_id: "default" with no other fields.

category_id.description: Unique ID of the folder, or "default" for the default folder.

symbol.description: Emoji or zomoji symbol for the folder.

state.description: Whether the folder is expanded or collapsed.

pinned-chat.description: Represents a pinned chat entry within a folder.

chat_type.description: Type of the chat, such as direct_message, bot, channel, group_chat.

participant_count.description: Number of participants in the chat.

is_pinned.description: Whether the chat is currently pinned.

get-pin-categories-response.description: Response envelope for listing all pin folders.

create-pin-category-request.description: Request body for creating a new pin folder.

title.description:
Display title of the chat folder.
Maximum Length: 255 characters.

symbol.description:
Emoji or zomoji symbol for the folder.
Maximum Length: 50 characters.
Send an empty string to create the folder without a symbol.

chat_ids.description:
Optional list of chat IDs to pin within the folder.
Maximum chat IDs: 100.
If provided, these chats will be pinned in the order specified. Otherwise, the folder will be created empty.

create-pin-category-response.description: Response envelope after creating a pin folder.

update-pin-category-request.description:
Request body for updating a pin folder. Send exactly one operation type per request.

Operation types:
  • Update Folder Details: Send title, symbol, and/or state.
  • Reorder a Chat: Send chat_id with optional pin_above and required last_sync_time.
  • Reorder a Folder: Send pin_above only (no chat_id) with required last_sync_time.
  • Bulk Update Chats: Send chat_ids (array) with required last_sync_time.

symbol.description: New emoji or zomoji. Maximum 50 characters. Send an empty string to clear.

state.description: Toggle the folder's expanded or collapsed state.

chat_id.description: ID of the chat to reorder within the folder.

chat_ids.description: Replacement list of chat IDs. Replaces all existing chats in the folder. Maximum 100 items.

pin_above.description:
ID of the item above which to place the target. Used for both chat and folder reordering.
If omitted, the item is moved to the end.

last_sync_time.description: Required for reorder and bulk update operations. Accepts ISO 8601 datetime strings or epoch timestamps. The server rejects the request if this is stale.

update-pin-category-details-request.description:
Request body for updating a pin folder. Send exactly one operation type per request.

Operation types:
  • Update Folder Details: Send title, symbol, and/or state.

title.description:
Update title of the chat folder.
Maximum Length: 255 characters.

symbol.description:
Update emoji or zomoji symbol for the folder.
Maximum Length: 50 characters.
Send an empty string to remove the symbol.

state.description:
Toggle the folder's expanded or collapsed state.
Allowed values:
  • expanded: The folder is expanded to show its contents.
  • collapsed: The folder is collapsed to hide its contents.

reorder-chat-in-category-request.description:
Request body for updating a pin folder. Send exactly one operation type per request.

Operation types:
  • Reorder a Chat: Send chat_id with optional pin_above and required last_sync_time.

chat_id.description: Unique ID of the chat to be reordered within the chat folder.

pin_above.description: Unique ID of the chat above which the specified chat should be placed. If not provided, the chat will be moved to the end of the chat folder.

last_sync_time.description:
• Timestamp of the client's most recent sync state.
  • This is used to ensure the chat folder has not been modified since the client last synced.
  • If the provided timestamp is outdated, the request will be rejected to prevent conflicting updates.
Format: Accepts either ISO 8601 datetime strings or epoch timestamps.

reorder-category-request.description:
Request body for updating a pin folder. Send exactly one operation type per request.

Operation types:
  • Reorder a Folder: Send pin_above only (no chat_id) with required last_sync_time.

pin_above.description:
Unique ID of the chat folder above which the specified chat folder should be placed.
If not provided, the folder will be moved to the end of the chat folder list.

last_sync_time.description:
• Timestamp of the client's most recent sync state.
  • This is used to ensure the chat folder has not been modified since the client last synced.
  • If the provided timestamp is outdated, the request will be rejected to prevent conflicting updates.
Format: Accepts either ISO 8601 datetime strings or epoch timestamps.

bulk-update-chats-in-category-request.description:
Request body for updating a pin folder. Send exactly one operation type per request.

Operation types:
  • Bulk Update Chats: Send chat_ids (array) with required last_sync_time.

chat_ids.description:
• Array of chat IDs that should be present in the chat folder, with a maximum of 100 chats.
  • The provided list completely replaces the existing chats in the folder.
  • To add a new chat without removing existing ones, include both the existing and new chat IDs in the request.
Use the Retrieve Chat Folders API to get the current list of pinned chats in a folder and then modify that list as needed and send it back in this request to update the folder's contents.

For new Chat IDs, you can retrieve them from the List Chats API or List Channels API from the chat object returned in message payloads.

last_sync_time.description:
• Timestamp of the client's most recent sync state.
  • This is used to ensure the chat folder has not been modified since the client last synced.
  • If the provided timestamp is outdated, the request will be rejected to prevent conflicting updates.
Format: Accepts either ISO 8601 datetime strings or epoch timestamps.

pin-chat-request.description: Request body for pinning a chat. All fields are optional.

category_id.description:
Unique ID of the chat folder to pin the chat under. If omitted, the chat will be pinned under My Pins section (default folder).

To learn how to retrieve this ID, see Retrieve Chat Folders API, where category_id represents the ID of the chat folder.

pin-chat-response.description: Response envelope after pinning a chat.

unpin-chat-response.description: Response envelope after unpinning a chat.

error-response.description: Error response returned by the My Pins API.
